description: Access to PC or Client optical vision to take snapshots. Can use the local server webcam OR trigger the user's own device camera (phone/browser).
routing_instructions: WEBCAM ROUTING RULE: When the user says 'phone', 'smartphone', 'mobile', 'il telefono', 'browser', or any remote device, you MUST call WEBCAM take_snapshot with target='client'. NEVER use target='server' when the user is asking from a phone.

commands.take_snapshot: Takes a photo. Use target='server' for PC webcam, target='client' for the user's own phone or browser.

function.name: WEBCAM__take_snapshot
function.description: Takes a photo. CRITICAL: Use target='server' for PC webcam, target='client' for user's phone. DO NOT use this for 'generating' AI art or drawings; use IMAGE_GEN instead.

target.description: REQUIRED ROUTING. Use 'client' if user says phone/smartphone/browser. Use 'server' for local PC webcam. NEVER use this to 'generate' photos of cats/characters.
